message:
Command `
# state_out.json created for step 72!
# The odb points to drt-run-0 (post-routing ODB)
# The def points to pre-DRT DEF (from step 67 antenna insertion)
# 
# Now: resume the flow from the step AFTER DRT.
# In LibreLane Classic flow, after OpenROAD.DetailedRouting comes OpenROAD.FillInsertion
# Let me verify this by looking at what step would be step 73.
#
# Actually, I should check what step-id to use for --from
# In LibreLane, the step names follow the pattern seen in step directories.
# After "openroad-detailedrouting" (step 72), the next step would be 
# "openroad-fillinsertion" or "magic-streamout" or similar.
#
# Let me check what step comes after DRT in the standard flow:

librelane --help 2>/dev/null | head -5
echo ""
# In OpenLane Classic flow: DRT → FillInsertion → Magic.StreamOut → Magic.DRC → Magic.SpiceExtraction → Netgen.LVS
# The --from argument needs the step class name (e.g., "OpenROAD.FillInsertion")
#
# Let me try to resume from FillInsertion

MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
DESIGN="mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"

echo "=== Resuming flow from FillInsertion: $(date) ==="
cd "$MCU_DIR/openlane/${DESIGN}"

# Run LibreLane from FillInsertion onwards
nohup librelane \
  --pdk-root /nc/apps/pdk \
  --pdk sky130A \
  --last-run \
  -F OpenROAD.FillInsertion \
  config.json \
  > /tmp/librelane_fill.log 2>&1 &
LR_PID=$!
echo "LibreLane PID: $LR_PID"
echo "Log: /tmp/librelane_fill.log"

# Wait and check
sleep 15
echo ""
echo "=== Initial state ==="
ps aux | grep -E "(librelane|openroad|magic)" | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2,"CMD:"$11,"CPU:"$3"%"}'
tail -20 /tmp/librelane_fill.log
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -5
` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "
# state_out.json created for step 72!
# The odb points to drt-run-0 (post-routing ODB)
# The def points to pre-DRT DEF (from step 67 antenna insertion)
# 
# Now: resume the flow from the step AFTER DRT.
# In LibreLane Classic flow, after OpenROAD.DetailedRouting comes OpenROAD.FillInsertion
# Let me verify this by looking at what step would be step 73.
#
# Actually, I should check what step-id to use for --from
# In LibreLane, the step names follow the pattern seen in step directories.
# After "openroad-detailedrouting" (step 72), the next step would be 
# "openroad-fillinsertion" or "magic-streamout" or similar.
#
# Let me check what step comes after DRT in the standard flow:

librelane --help 2>/dev/null | head -5
echo ""
# In OpenLane Classic flow: DRT → FillInsertion → Magic.StreamOut → Magic.DRC → Magic.SpiceExtraction → Netgen.LVS
# The --from argument needs the step class name (e.g., "OpenROAD.FillInsertion")
#
# Let me try to resume from FillInsertion

MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
DESIGN="mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"

echo "=== Resuming flow from FillInsertion: $(date) ==="
cd "$MCU_DIR/openlane/${DESIGN}"

# Run LibreLane from FillInsertion onwards
nohup librelane \
  --pdk-root /nc/apps/pdk \
  --pdk sky130A \
  --last-run \
  -F OpenROAD.FillInsertion \
  config.json \
  > /tmp/librelane_fill.log 2>&1 &
LR_PID=$!
echo "LibreLane PID: $LR_PID"
echo "Log: /tmp/librelane_fill.log"

# Wait and check
sleep 15
echo ""
echo "=== Initial state ==="
ps aux | grep -E "(librelane|openroad|magic)" | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2,"CMD:"$11,"CPU:"$3"%"}'
tail -20 /tmp/librelane_fill.log
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -5
", "timeout": 30}
function.name: execute_bash

  object.
